# Rollcally

> Smart roll call and attendance tracking for organisations — free to get started.

## What is Rollcally?

Rollcally is a progressive web app (PWA) that replaces paper-based roll calls with a fast, digital check-in system. Admins set up an event once, share a QR code, and members scan to mark themselves present — all in real time.

It is built for any structured organisation that takes regular attendance:

- **Churches and ministries** — Sunday services, Bible studies, choir rehearsals
- **Schools and training centres** — class registers, extracurricular clubs
- **Corporates** — team meetings, workshops, compliance training
- **Nonprofits and community groups** — volunteer meetings, community events

## Key features

- **QR code check-in** — members scan with any smartphone camera; no app install required
- **Real-time attendance dashboard** — admins see a live count as members check in
- **Push notifications** — send a one-tap check-in link directly to members' devices
- **Member management** — create and organise member profiles by units/teams
- **Geolocation enforcement** — optional per-event setting to ensure members are on premises before checking in
- **Attendance analytics** — historical reports, trends, and present/absent breakdowns
- **Multi-unit support** — one organisation, many sub-groups (departments, classes, choirs)
- **Birthday and anniversary notifications** — automated member celebration reminders
- **Offline-capable PWA** — works reliably even with poor connectivity

## Pricing

Free to get started. No credit card required.

## Technology

Web application — works on any modern browser on iOS, Android, and desktop.
No native app download required.

## Keywords

roll call app, attendance tracking app, attendance software, QR code check-in, digital attendance register, church attendance tracker, school attendance app, corporate attendance, nonprofit attendance management, member management app, real-time attendance, push notification check-in
